title: THE BLACK BOX — FINAL DIRECTOR'S CUT V8
episodeObjective: Recover the Black Box sequence, identify the impossible voice, force a real cost between Noah's mind and the recorder data, and reveal the ninth crew contradiction.
rulesApplied: Humanization Pass V4: character first, lore second.
ECHO V5 consequence pass: trust changes appear in dialogue and episode flags.
UNKNOWN pushes story instead of generic glitch noise.
Every visible choice group has exactly two choices.
Noah is written as physically damaged and unreliable, not as a lore narrator.
One irreversible loss is required: Black Box data loss or Noah memory damage.

blackbox_sector_correlation_11.title: BLACK BOX SECTOR CORRELATION
blackbox_sector_correlation_11.description: Match each recovered recorder sector with the correct incident event.

decrypt_voice_fragment.title: VOICE FRAGMENT ANALYSIS
decrypt_voice_fragment.description: Corrupted voice signature detected. Use the recovered pod, suit and black box records.

events.text: For a second I thought I was still in the glass.
I remember the alarm like it was minutes ago.
If I start making too much sense, stop me.

events.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 01
events.content:
21:09 — Crew Assembly
21:11 — Unauthorized Access Request
21:12 — Internal Channel Opened

Sector Integrity: 61%
Audio Layer: damaged
Conflict Note: Crew count checksum does not match current manifest.
events.caption: Recovered black box recorder sector 01. Crew count checksum is inconsistent.
events.message: [BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 01 ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

choices.text: HALE, WHAT WAS THE ACCESS REQUEST?

events.text: Every broken file suddenly points at my hands.
You keep asking like you already decided.
Say you think I did it.
Nobody was supposed to be opening anything.

events.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 02
events.content:
21:13 — Emergency Lockdown
21:14 — Manual Override Requested
21:14 — Override Source: INTERNAL

Sector Integrity: 54%
Command Chain: partially suppressed
Timestamp Conflict: override request appears twice. First record deleted.
events.caption: Recovered sector 02. A deleted first override record is referenced by the recorder index.
events.message: [BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 02 ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.title: DELETED OVERRIDE SHADOW
events.content:
Recovered index shadow:
21:14 — Manual Override Requested
Source: INTERNAL
Identity Layer: REMOVED
Operator Class: CREW
Secondary marker: N.V.

Warning: identity layer removed after incident report was generated.
events.caption: Partial deleted override record. It points toward N.V. but shows later tampering.
events.message: [DELETED OVERRIDE SHADOW ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.speaker: NOAH
events.text: Or someone wanted it to be.
That's not a metaphor. I mean actual hot plastic.

events.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 03
events.content:
21:15 — Voice Authorization Accepted
Identity: HIDDEN
Authorization Phrase: OPEN THE STATION

Sector Integrity: 43%
Voice sample recoverable
Conflict: Subject marker appears inside emergency pod record at 21:08.
events.caption: Recovered sector 03. Voice authorization conflicts with pod occupancy timestamp.
events.message: [BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 03 ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.speaker: HALE
events.text: Rebuild the sequence. Not the story you want.

events.title: SAFE VOICE RECOVERY
events.subtitle: Protecting live subject from neural echo exposure

events.speaker: HALE
events.text: And the recorder just lost a room.

events.speaker: HALE
events.text: That's what a sector is when people die in it.

events.title: AGGRESSIVE VOICE RECOVERY
events.subtitle: Forcing full voiceprint extraction through live memory echo

events.text: Why can't I remember her face?

events.title: VOICE SAMPLE
events.content:
VOICE SAMPLE
CORRUPTED
RECOVERY POSSIBLE

Recovered phrase:
"OPEN THE STATION"

Reference candidates:
- Ethan Hale
- Maya Chen
- Noah Voss

Manual identification required.
Conflict: source subject appears inside pod prior to authorization.
events.caption: Corrupted voice sample recovered from black box recorder.

events.text: If it comes back as my voice...
Do not drag a living brain through a damaged recorder.

events.title: VOICE SIGNATURE MATCH
events.subtitle: Comparing recovered voiceprint with pod archive

events.title: VOICE ANALYSIS RESULT
events.content:
MATCH FOUND

IDENTITY: NOAH VOSS
AUTHORIZED COMMAND: OPEN THE STATION
TIMESTAMP: 21:15

Conflict: Noah Voss was registered inside emergency pod cryostasis before voice authorization was accepted.
Secondary Conflict: Crew manifest checksum expects NINE active profiles, not eight.
events.caption: Voiceprint match result. The voice is Noah's, but the timeline and crew count conflict.
events.message: [VOICE ANALYSIS RESULT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

events.text: Hale saying not to wake me.
Because something was using his authorization.
And before you ask, yes, I know how that sounds.
I locked Noah away because the station kept answering in his voice.
But that's not the impossible part.
The impossible part is the crew list.

episode12UsageNotes.blackBoxSector04Lost: Sector 04 is permanently lost; Episode 12 must not recover it cleanly.
episode12UsageNotes.noahMemoryCollapse: Noah should have memory skips and trouble recalling the missing woman's face.
episode12UsageNotes.pressedHaleEarly: Hale begins Episode 12 more defensive and less cooperative.
episode12UsageNotes.tracedDeletedOverride: Episode 12 can reference the N.V. deleted override shadow.
episode12UsageNotes.fastBlackBoxRecovery: Fast recovery should leave heat damage or corrupted side effects.
episode12UsageNotes.securedBlackBoxBeforeReveal: Recording is safer, but Maya remembers the operator delayed the question.
episode12UsageNotes.crewNineRevealed: Episode 12 must begin with the ninth crew contradiction active.
episode12UsageNotes.followedNinthCrewTrace: Episode 12 opens by chasing the missing crew trace.
episode12UsageNotes.protectedNoahChannel: Episode 12 opens with Noah more stable but UNKNOWN less constrained.

directorCut.coreRewrite: Rebuilt compact version from the provided Episode 11 JSON while preserving the Black Box puzzle spine and voice identification puzzle.
majorChanges: Noah rewritten as physically damaged and unreliable before providing lore.
Hale trust pressure made visible in dialogue.
UNKNOWN rewritten to push story: Hale lock, missing first lock, timestamp conflict, missing ninth crew.
Added irreversible branch: safe recovery loses Black Box Sector 04 permanently.
Added irreversible branch: aggressive recovery damages Noah's memory.
Voice match now exposes crew count mismatch.
Final cliffhanger changed from identity confusion to the ninth crew reveal.
